title: 3Lives
description: You have 3 lives, before you get banned.
body:
# 3Lives
A Minecraft mod aimed at making multiplayer environments more fun!

## Features:
You start with 3 yellow hearts indicating lives at the top of your hotbar. On each death caused by a player (direct or indirect), you lose one of these lives/heart. Upon losing all in singleplayer (LAN), you are set to spectator mode. Whilst in multiplayer, you are permanently banned.

There is a /life command that lets you add or remove a player's life for testing purposes!
Alternatively, you can look for playerlives.json in the configs folder, where every player's lives are stored with their UUID.
